ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/JavaGuide
Language: java
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计。准备后端技术面试，首选 JavaGuide！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZCShou/GoGoGo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZCShou/GoGoGo
Language: java
一个基于 Android 调试 API + 百度地图实现的虚拟定位工具，并且同时实现了一个可以自由移动的摇杆

Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: conductor-oss/conductor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor
Language: java
Conductor is an event driven agentic orchestration platform providing durable and highly resilient execution engine for applications and AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: halo-dev/halo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/halo-dev/halo
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
【AI低代码平台】“低代码+零代码”双模驱动AI智能平台 AI low-code platform empowers enterprises to quickly develop low-code solutions and build AI applications. 助力企业快速实现低代码开发和构建AI应用！ AI应用平台涵盖：AI应用、AI模型、AI聊天助手、知识库、AI流程编排、MCP和插件，聊天式业务操作等。 强大代码生成器：实现前后端一键生成，无需手写代码! 显著提升效率节省成本，又不失灵活~

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra
Language: java
Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-instrumentation
Language: java
OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation and instrumentation libraries for Java

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
